mapper.select:
SELECT A.BOARD_NO , B.MENU_NM AS PARENT_NM , A.BOARD_NM , A.COMMENT_YN FROM BOARD_MASTER A JOIN MENU_MASTER B ON A.PARENT_CD = CONCAT(B.MENU_LCD, "00") WHERE 1=1
AND A.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}

SELECT C.RN , C.POST_NO , C.TITLE , C.USER_NM , C.FM_REG_DATE , C.VIEW_CNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.POST_NO DESC) AS RN , A.POST_NO , A.TITLE , B.USER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.REG_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d") AS FM_REG_DATE , A.VIEW_CNT FROM POST_MASTER A JOIN USER_MASTER B ON A.REG_NO = B.USER_IDX WHERE 1=1
AND A.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
AND B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schAuthor}, '%')
AND ( A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schKeyword}, '%') OR A.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schKeyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY A.POST_NO DESC ) C WHERE 1=1
AND C.RN BETWEEN (#{curIdx} + (#{pageUnit} * (#{curPage} - 1))) AND (#{pageUnit} + (#{pageUnit} * (#{curPage} - 1)))
ORDER BY C.RN , C.POST_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_MASTER A JOIN USER_MASTER B ON A.REG_NO = B.USER_IDX WHERE 1=1
AND A.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
AND B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schAuthor}, '%')
AND ( A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schKeyword}, '%') OR A.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schKeyword}, '%') )

SELECT A.POST_NO , A.BOARD_NO , A.TITLE , A.CONTENT , DATE_FORMAT(A.REG_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d") AS FM_REG_DATE , B.USER_NM , A.REG_DATE , A.VIEW_CNT FROM POST_MASTER A JOIN USER_MASTER B ON A.REG_NO = B.USER_IDX WHERE 1=1
AND A.POST_NO = #{postNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_POST_MAPPER WHERE 1=1
AND POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_MASTER ( FILE_NM , FILE_NM_DTL , REG_NO , REG_DATE , UP_NO , UP_DATE ) VALUES ( #{fileNm} , #{uploadFileNm} , '1' , NOW() , '1' , NOW() )

INSERT INTO FILE_POST_MAPPER ( FILE_NO , POST_NO , REG_NO , REG_DATE , UP_NO , UP_DATE ) VALUES ( ( SELECT MAX(FILE_NO) FROM FILE_MASTER )
, ( SELECT MAX(POST_NO) + 1 FROM POST_MASTER )
, #{postNo}
, #{regNo} , NOW() , #{upNo} , NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE POST_MASTER SET VIEW_CNT = #{viewCnt} + 1 WHERE 1=1
AND POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM POST_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND POST_NO = #{postNo}

DELETE FROM FILE_POST_MAPPER WHERE 1=1
AND POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND POST_NO = #{postNo}
